bead.title: Stage 4.14: Playwright suite — navigation spec
bead.description: New file: cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/navigation.spec.ts. Tests: / redirects to /nodes/:nodeId, nav chrome renders, project picker navigates. Minimum 5 test cases with TC-NNN identifiers. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #48.
bead.acceptance: (1) `bun run test:e2e -- navigation` passes locally. (2) Same test passes after `make build` + server restart. (3) Test file contains at least 5 `test(` or `test.describe(` blocks with TC-NNN identifiers.
